/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -o /home/t2508/warda/dpvo/DPVO-main/DPViewer/build/lib.linux-x86_64-cpython-310/dpviewer.cpython-311-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/dpviewer.dir/viewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpviewer.dir/viewer_cuda.cu.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.11.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
